mapper.sql: id, name, description, color_hex, sort_order, status, created_at, updated_at

SELECT b.id, b.name, b.description, b.color_hex, b.sort_order, b.status, b.created_at, b.updated_at, COALESCE(ps.post_count, 0) AS post_count, COALESCE(rs.reply_count, 0) AS reply_count, lp.id AS latest_post_id, lp.title AS latest_post_title, lp.updated_at AS latest_post_updated_at FROM boards b LEFT JOIN ( SELECT board_id, COUNT(*) AS post_count FROM posts WHERE status = 1 GROUP BY board_id ) ps ON ps.board_id = b.id LEFT JOIN ( SELECT p.board_id, COUNT(r.id) AS reply_count FROM posts p JOIN replies r ON r.post_id = p.id AND r.status = 1 WHERE p.status = 1 GROUP BY p.board_id ) rs ON rs.board_id = b.id LEFT JOIN LATERAL ( SELECT id, title, updated_at FROM posts WHERE board_id = b.id AND status = 1 ORDER BY updated_at DESC, id DESC LIMIT 1 ) lp ON TRUE
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO boards (name, description, color_hex, sort_order, status) VALUES ( #{name}, COALESCE(#{description}, ''), COALESCE(#{colorHex}, '#007aff'), COALESCE(#{sortOrder}, 0), COALESCE(#{status}, 1) )
mapper.update: UPDATE boards SET name = #{name}, description = COALESCE(#{description}, ''), color_hex = COALESCE(#{colorHex}, '#007aff'), sort_order = COALESCE(#{sortOrder}, 0), status = COALESCE(#{status}, 1), updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select:
WHERE b.status = 1
AND b.name ILIKE '%' || #{keyword} || '%'
ORDER BY b.sort_order ASC, b.id ASC
mapper.update: UPDATE boards SET status = #{status}, updated_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
